title: Creamy Peruvian Citrus Soup
description: A refreshing and tangy soup combining the flavors of Peru, with a hint of citrus.

ingredients.name: peruvian
ingredients.amount: 2 cups mixed roasted corn and potatoes

instructions: In a large pot, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Soffritto the onion until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the vegetable broth, roasted corn and potatoes, and heavy cream.
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 15 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Stir in the orange juice and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve warm, garnished with diced celery and a sprinkle of grated ginger if desired.
